title: Mario PowerUps
body: Mario PowerUps adds things from Super Mario (Mainly PowerUps) into Minecraft YOU NEED [GECKOLIB](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions) DO **NOT** USE OPTIFINE **Mod Features:** Super Mushroom: Makes the player have 20 hearts 1Up: Gives the player an extra life (you can take as many extra lives as you want) Fire Flower: Shoot fireballs Ice Flower: Shoot Iceballs Super Leaf: Makes players stronger and grants the ability to glide Super Star: Makes the player immortal, faster and able to kill anything just touching it Cloud Flower: Makes the player able to create solid clouds Gold Flower: Shoot Golden Fireballs wich turn entities into coins Green Shell: Is rideable and can walk on water and lava Poison Mushroom: If player has a power up deals 1 damage else kills the player Propeller Mushroom: Makes you fly, gives you Slow Falling and lets you spin down to the ground  (all pressing space) Boomerang Flower: Makes you able to throw Boomerangs P-Wing: Brings you to the End Coin: You can craft a gold nugget with it, if you have 100 Coins in your inventory they become a 1Up  Lakitu's Cloud: It's rideable and can fly Yoshi: It's rideable and can glide Music Disc: Plays "Super Mario Bros Theme." with noteblock sounds (Made by [accartez](https://www.youtube.com/@acatterz)) These are all obtainable in survival mode [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mario-powerups)
